name: Lamb Meatballs, Persian Style
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds lamb stew meat, ground fine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, allow the bulgar wheat to soak in boiling water for 1/2 hour. Drain well.
2. In a large bowl, combine the meatball ingredients, including the drained bulgar, and mix very well. Form into 1-1/2 inch balls and place on a baking sheet. Keep your hands damp with a little water to facilitate forming the meatballs.
3. Bake for 20 minutes in a pre-heated oven set to 375°F, or until cooked through.
